dual_intent_strategy.primary_intent: commercial-trust — buyer deciding whether Curious Tails is safe and worth choosing
dual_intent_strategy.secondary_intent: informational — what AVS licensing actually requires of a pet shop
dual_intent_strategy.resolution: Tell the Nelson & Kim story through the lens of what licensing enforces (inspections, PPD, training, renewal), with verification kept brief and delegated to /learn/verify-license to avoid cannibalizing that page.

cannibalization_note: The step-by-step 'how to verify' guide belongs to /learn/verify-license (keyword: how to check pet shop license Singapore). This page mentions verification once and links out. Smuggling depth belongs to /learn/smuggled-puppies; one protective mention here.
meta_title: AVS Licensed Pet Shop Singapore | Why Curious Tails
meta_description: Curious Tails is an AVS licensed pet shop in Balestier (licence AS24J00046): welfare inspections, buyer screening, and honest breed matching by Nelson and Kim.
h1: Trusted Puppy Shop, AVS Licensed & Verified

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS licensed pet shop at 2 Balestier Road, Singapore (licence AS24J00046), run hands-on by owners Nelson and Kim for 2+ years, with a 5.0-star Google rating.

An AVS licensed pet shop is a business licensed by the Animal and Veterinary Service (NParks) to keep and sell pets. The licence requires welfare inspections, mandatory buyer-suitability screening (Pet Purchase Declaration), staff training recognised by AVS, and annual renewal.

faq.question: What is your AVS licence number?
faq.answer_direction: AS24J00046, searchable on the AVS public registry. Our ACRA company registration (202420075D) is a separate identifier; the AVS licence is the one that matters for pet shops.

faq.question: What does the Pet Purchase Declaration ask me?
faq.answer_direction: It assesses whether you are ready for a pet: housing type, household agreement, time and financial readiness. Licensed shops must run it before any sale; it protects the puppy and you.

faq.question: Why are you cheaper than bigger licensed shops?
faq.answer_direction: Low marketing overhead passed on; the same AVS standards apply to every licensed shop.

faq.question: What support do we get after buying?
faq.answer_direction: In-home kit walkthrough, free first training lesson, free WhatsApp care support, and the 5-day nurse-back if the puppy falls sick.

faq.question: Can we visit before deciding?
faq.answer_direction: Yes: 2 Balestier Road #01-701, weekdays 12pm to 6pm, weekends 10am to 6pm; WhatsApp first so we can have the right puppies ready to meet.

faq.question: How do I check any pet shop is really licensed?
faq.answer_direction: Search the AVS public registry; a legitimate shop appears there. Our full step-by-step guide covers the red flags too.
